title: aquilegia coerulea var. ochroleuca
intro: Aquilegia coerulea var. ochroleuca, also known as the Golden Columbine, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The Golden Columbine is a perennial plant with delicate, bell-shaped flowers in shades of yellow and white. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant include soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
